## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt

## Checklist

- [ ] Target branch is `develop` (or `main` only for release/hotfix PRs)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] CI checks are green (CI, CodeQL, Security, DAST when applicable)
